testsuite.name: agentforge.orchestrator.WorkflowEngineTest

testcase.name: execute waits for all predecessors before fan-in: [A, B] → C
execute runs tasks in sequence for linear DAG: A → B → C
task failure prevents dependent tasks from executing
execute runs independent tasks in parallel: A → [B, C]
execute handles diamond: A → [B, C] → D
parallel tasks execute concurrently, not sequentially
topologicalSort returns correct order for linear DAG
task receives predecessor outputs as inputs

testsuite.system-out: 08:31:27.685 [] INFO agentforge.orchestrator.WorkflowEngine -- Skipping task C — predecessor failed
